channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The 'FIFA 15' is American culinary diplomacy in action
item.description: World Cup travelers are embracing American foods like ranch dressing and Raising Cane's, showcasing the power of cultural exchange.

item.title: Bitcoin down 20% since May as Strategy fallout spooks investors
item.description: Concerns over Strategy and interest rates have pressured crypto, but Bitwise's Matt Hougan says the downturn may set up a new rally.

item.title: The most coveted accessory at Paris Fashion Week was an ice pack
item.description: During a historic heat wave in Paris, fashion houses used mist machines, chilled towels, and parasols to keep guests cool.

item.title: A Brookings paper inadvertently explains Zohran Mamdani
item.description: The key finding was almost an afterthought: 62 of the 100 most AI-exposed U.S. counties voted Democratic in 2024.
